name: seatunnel-deepwiki-skill
description: Repository knowledge assistant for Apache SeaTunnel.

interface.shortDescription: Ask repository-grounded questions about Apache SeaTunnel.
interface.longDescription: Provides an Apache SeaTunnel repository knowledge assistant for architecture, connectors, engines, jobs, configuration, build/test workflows, deployment, and implementation questions. DeepWiki MCP is used as the underlying retrieval channel.
defaultPrompt: Use $seatunnel-deepwiki-skill to answer my Apache SeaTunnel repository question.
